name: PN7160 NFC
description: The `pn7160_spi` component allows you to use [SPI-equipped](https://esphome.io/components/spi) PN7160 NFC controllers with ESPHome.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: The pin connected to the PN7160's `NSS` (chip select) line.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Dwl Req Pin
config_entries.description: The pin connected to the PN7160's `DWL_REQ` line. Used to invoke the PN7160's firmware update mode; may be used in a future release.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Wkup Req Pin
config_entries.description: The pin connected to the PN7160's `WKUP_REQ` line. May be used to improve power management in a future release.

config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: SPI ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [SPI Component](https://esphome.io/components/spi) if you want to use multiple SPI buses.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this component.

config_entries.label: Emulation Message
config_entries.description: When scanned by another NFC card/tag reader (such as a smartphone), this string is used as the content for an NDEF-formatted response. This allows the PN7160 to act as a tag in addition to a tag reader/writer.

config_entries.label: Tag Ttl
config_entries.description: The duration that must elapse after the PN7160 is no longer able to "see" a tag before it is considered to have been removed from the reader.
